title: AI News: Welcome to Voice2Website
description: Daily-style AI briefings designed for builders — optimized for search, fast to skim, and built to convert.

sections.heading: What This Is
sections.body: This page is a continuously-updated AI briefing hub for builders who want to ship faster. Every post is written to be SEO-friendly, readable, and action-oriented — with clear takeaways for monetization, conversion, and automation.

sections.heading: Why It Matters
sections.body: Search engines reward consistent, relevant publishing. By pairing clean information architecture (index + per-story pages) with fast performance and ad-ready placements, Voice2Website is built to compound traffic into subscribers.

sections.heading: How Subscriptions Help You Build
sections.body: Starter, Pro, and BOSS subscriptions unlock a 30‑day access window per cycle (billed every 31 days). If you need more capacity on demand, the Extra Commands Pack adds five more commands instantly.
